JSON Formatter Pro
Formatter About FAQ Contact Privacy
Source

Privacy

JSON Formatter Pro is a client-side tool. Any JSON you paste, type, upload, or drop into the editor is processed entirely in your browser. It is never uploaded to any server, and no analytics events contain your content.

What is stored locally

  • Your last input (up to 512 KB) so the editor restores when you return.
  • Your formatting preferences: indentation, transforms, selected view, and theme.

These live in your browser's localStorage under the key json-formatter-pro. Clearing your browser storage removes them completely.

Network requests

Once the page is loaded, JSON Formatter Pro makes no network requests with your content. No third-party scripts, fonts, or trackers are loaded at runtime.

Analytics

If enabled by the site operator, Cloudflare Web Analytics may be used for aggregate, cookieless page view counts. It does not receive your JSON content and does not identify individual users.

Advertising & Third-Party Services

JSON Formatter Pro may display advertisements through Google AdSense or other advertising partners. These partners may:

  • Use cookies and similar tracking technologies to serve ads based on your browsing activity
  • Collect information about your visits to display personalized ads
  • Use Google Analytics for analytics purposes

You can control ad personalization through your Google Ads Settings at adssettings.google.com.

Cookies

JSON Formatter Pro uses cookies for:

  • Functional: Theme preference, localStorage persistence (retained indefinitely until user clears)
  • Analytics: Cloudflare Web Analytics (non-identifying, aggregate only)
  • Advertising: Google AdSense and advertising partner cookies (retained per their policies, typically 13 months)

You can disable cookies in your browser settings. Note that disabling cookies may affect tool functionality.

Data Retention

Browser Storage: Your formatter input and preferences are retained in browser localStorage until you manually clear them.

Analytics Data: Cloudflare Web Analytics data is retained in accordance with Cloudflare's privacy practices.

Google AdSense Cookies: Retained per Google's policies, typically 13 months from last activity.

GDPR & User Rights (EU/EEA Users)

If you are located in the European Union or European Economic Area, you have the following rights:

  • Right to Access: You can request a copy of your personal data
  • Right to Rectification: You can correct inaccurate data
  • Right to Erasure: You can request deletion of your data
  • Right to Restrict Processing: You can limit how your data is used
  • Right to Portability: You can obtain your data in a portable format
  • Right to Object: You can object to processing for marketing purposes

To exercise these rights, contact us at hashcode.dev@gmail.com.

CCPA Rights (California Users)

If you are a California resident, the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) grants you the right to:

  • Know what personal information is being collected
  • Know whether your personal information is sold or disclosed
  • Say no to the sale or sharing of your personal information
  • Access your personal information
  • Request deletion of information

To exercise CCPA rights, contact us at hashcode.dev@gmail.com.

Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.

Contact

Questions about this privacy policy or your data? Contact us at:

  • Email: hashcode.dev@gmail.com
  • Support: Contact Us

© 2026 JSON Formatter Pro. All rights reserved. Everything runs in your browser — no data is sent to a server.
